positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a group of friendly woodland animals (a fox, a rabbit, and a little owl) gathering in a cozy forest clearing. The scene is bathed in soft, golden hour light filtering through oversized leaves. The style should be highly detailed watercolor and colored pencil art, evoking a cottagecore aesthetic. Include elements like tiny mushroom clusters, glowing fireflies, and moss-covered logs. Fantasy illustration, storybook quality, whimsical, peaceful, pastel color palette, intricate details, volumetric lighting, masterpiece, 8k resolution, by Beatrix Potter and Studio Ghibli.
